name: diag-tool
description: UDS diagnostic scanner for VAG modules — simulated transport + full UDS client (alpha). Live mode requires external VAG-COM interface (VCDS HEX, VNCI 6154a). Installed as a Java JAR artifact; no GEM screens.
author: dspl1236
notes: This module ships a compiled JAR (modules/diag-tool/diag-tool.jar) and its Java source.
The JAR is NOT auto-installed by the builder at this time — it is a development artifact for reverse-engineering and integration work.
Live mode against real ECUs requires a VAG-COM cable (VCDS HEX or VNCI 6154a) and a laptop host. The MMI itself does not originate UDS traffic.
Simulated mode runs offline against SimulatedTransport — useful for development without a vehicle.
